name: Fat Man's Potato Soup
recipeIngredient: chicken or vegetable soup base (or bouillon cubes) - 2 cups total
1 large leek, chopped fine, up to 2 stalks
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, heat the milk and cream until warm.
2. Add the soup base (or bouillon) and stir until it dissolves.
3. Peel potatoes and grate them directly into the pan with the milk mixture.
4. Keep the temperature low to prevent boiling over.
5. Stir in the leek, whisking to incorporate and thicken the sauce.
6. Once thickened, add the butter and stir until melted.
7. Add the cheese and continue stirring until it melts completely.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Ladle into bowls, garnish with chopped chives or green onion and/or crispy bacon bits if desired, and serve immediately.
